question: उपजिल्ह्यांची क्रमवारी त्यांच्या एकूण एलोपॅथिक बाह्यरुग्ण उपस्थितीच्या आधारे, सर्वोच्च ते सर्वात कमी अशा क्रमाने करा.

SELECT dg.sub_district, SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services fos
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fos.geography_id = dg.geography_id
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dg.sub_district, SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services fos

GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance DESC;

question: २०२२ साठी, ग्रामीण भागात आयोजित केलेल्या एकूण लसीकरण सत्रांचे आणि त्यापैकी किती सत्रांमध्ये आशा कार्यकर्ता उपस्थित होते याचे उप-जिल्हावार विभाजन प्रदान करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD), SUM(T2.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_WITH_ASHA_PRESENT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T3.YEAR = '2022' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district, 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS total_immunisation_sessions, 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present) AS sessions_with_asha_present
FROM 
    fact_program_management fp
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fp.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_time dt ON fp.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE 
    dt.year = 2022 AND dg.type_of_area = 'Rural'
GROUP BY 
    dg.sub_district
ORDER BY

question: २०२१ साठी अंदमान आणि निकोबार बेटांमध्ये, ज्या क्षेत्रांमध्ये किमान एक सत्र नियोजित होते, त्यांच्यासाठी नियोजित आणि आयोजित लसीकरण सत्रांचे उप-जिल्हावार विवरण, तसेच तोंडी गोळ्या आणि कंडोमचे वितरण एकूण प्रदान करा. निकाल आयोजित सत्रांच्या संख्येनुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED), SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD), SUM(T3.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T3.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T3.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district, 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS total_planned_sessions, 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_held) AS total_held_sessions, 
    SUM(fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_oral_pill_distribution, 
    SUM(fp.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condom_distribution
FROM 
    fact_program_management fp
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fp.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_time dt ON fp.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE 
    dt.year = 2021 AND dg.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' AND fp.immunisation_sessions_planned > 0
GROUP BY 
    dg.sub_district
ORDER BY 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_held) DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district, 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS total_planned_sessions, 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_held) AS total_held_sessions, 
    SUM(fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_oral_pill_distribution, 
    SUM(fp.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condom_distribution
FROM 
    fact_program_management fp
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fp.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_time dt ON fp.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE 
    dt.year = 2021 AND dg.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' AND fp.immunisation_sessions_planned > 0
GROUP BY 
    dg.sub_district
ORDER BY 
    SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_held) DESC;
